data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Guest privileges (bring friend once/month)', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is adequately covered. While the linked use case mentions a guest pass, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that demonstrates the functionality or implementation of this feature. The lack of specific API reads or state checks to validate this requirement leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of guest privileges for bringing a friend once a month.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
